{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324011405D5AA916661C9243A23AB"}"},"total":1015},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7164453199720907523","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"牛，逻辑清晰，思路清晰，只有情节微显拖拉，应该犁庭扫穴平定洪荒，以展开洪荒之外情节，入侵啦…反入侵啦…征服啦…大道赏识啦…抵挡别的世界啦…征服别的世界啦，目标宏大点～出洪荒入鸿蒙～立足鸿蒙～征服鸿蒙～最后发现洪荒只是盘古的一个细胞，邪恶入侵只是盘古感冒了，轰轰烈烈的保卫战只是抵抗力，由此想象是不是盘古又是某人的细胞的思考，晋升更高层次…晋升…晋升…最终发现最高维度太无聊，再回首拉别人一起晋升去吧（参考盘龙最终设定）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1668105063,"group_id":"7144201841608231976","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwRJbqwYhpb2MyakknIzekcDH+NfZRslbr3ELndVVWf2","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/e237d4aecb5b46de8c2bc66bb8891523~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877576&x-signature=y15UJ3%2BltDyo8MLbd8UD40UN2jw%3D","user_id":"4432823951830212","user_name":"书虫杰哥"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4432823951830212","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7144201841608231976","book_info":{"abstract":"默默打工无人闻，一朝穿越天下知。
